response.title: Program Analyst
response.description: The City of Springfield is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Program Analyst to join our team. This role will support the planning, implementation, and evaluation of various public programs and services. The ideal candidate will possess strong analytical skills and a commitment to improving community services through data-driven decision-making.

required_skills: Data analysis using Excel and SQL
Knowledge of federal and state regulations
preferred_skills: Familiarity with grant writing and administration
Proficiency in Tableau or other data visualization tools
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Public Administration, Business Administration, or a related field
